name: weam
desc: Web app for teams of 20+ members. In-built connections to major LLMs via API. Share chats, prompts, and agents in team or private folders. Modern, fully respon…
descFull: Web app for teams of 20+ members. In-built connections to major LLMs via API. Share chats, prompts, and agents in team or private folders. Modern, fully responsive stack (Next.js, Node.js). Deploy your own vibe-coded AI apps, agents, or workflows or use ready-made solutions from the library.
